sql:
WITH positive_engagement_7_days AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201231' AND '20210107'
    AND LATERAL FLATTEN(input => EVENT_PARAMS) AS f
    WHERE f.value:engagement_time_msec::NUMBER > 0
),
positive_engagement_2_days AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20210106' AND '20210107'
    AND LATERAL FLATTEN(input => EVENT_PARAMS) AS f
    WHERE f.value:engagement_time_msec::NUMBER > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p7.USER_PSEUDO_ID)
FROM positive_engagement_7_days p7
LEFT JOIN positive_engagement_2_days p2
ON p7.USER_PSEUDO_ID = p2.USER_PSEUDO_ID
WHERE p2.USER_PSEUDO_ID IS NULL;
original_sql:
WITH positive_engagement_7_days AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201231' AND '20210107'
    AND LATERAL FLATTEN(input => EVENT_PARAMS) AS f
    WHERE f.value:engagement_time_msec::NUMBER > 0
),
positive_engagement_2_days AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20210106' AND '20210107'
    AND LATERAL FLATTEN(input => EVENT_PARAMS) AS f
    WHERE f.value:engagement_time_msec::NUMBER > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p7.USER_PSEUDO_ID)
FROM positive_engagement_7_days p7
LEFT JOIN positive_engagement_2_days p2
ON p7.USER_PSEUDO_ID = p2.USER_PSEUDO_ID
WHERE p2.USER_PSEUDO_ID IS NULL;
